notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler grounds out, second baseman Sung-Mun Song to first baseman Gavin Sheets.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas flies out to center fielder Bryce Johnson.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, shortstop Darell Hernaiz to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Rodolfo Durán out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ramón Laureano plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ramón Laureano hit by pitch. Gavin Sheets to 2nd.
